events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.

events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Gale Frost whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Ripple Tide asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Gale Frost whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
